label: 0–10m Split
protocol: Standing or 3-point start, electronic timing gates at 0m and 10m. Best of 3 with ≥3 min rest.

label: 0–20m Split
protocol: Same start. Gate at 20m. Best of 3 trials.

label: 0–30m Split
protocol: Standing start, fully rested, indoor track if possible. Best of 3.

label: 0–40m Split
protocol: Electronic timing only — hand timing inflates results by ~0.2s.

label: 0–60m Split
protocol: Block or 3-point start. Wind-legal if outdoors (<+2.0 m/s).

label: 100m Sprint
protocol: Full competition distance. Block start, electronic timing.

label: Flying 10m
protocol: 20m run-in to gate, then time across 10m. Use to derive max velocity.

label: Max Velocity
protocol: Radar or LPS device, or compute from a 10m fly: v = 10 / fly time.

label: 300m Split
protocol: Single rep on track, full warm-up, lane 1. Used predictor.

label: CMJ Height
protocol: Hands on hips, free counter-movement to self-selected depth. Force plate or validated jump mat. Best of 3.

label: CMJ Rel. Peak Power
protocol: Force plate concentric phase — peak power ÷ body mass. Best of 3.

label: CMJ Peak Force
protocol: Concentric peak vertical GRF from force plate.

label: Squat Jump Height
protocol: 90° knee, 3s pause, no dip. Hands on hips. Force plate or jump mat.

label: Eccentric Util. Ratio
protocol: CMJ height ÷ SJ height. Same session, 3 reps each.

label: Standing Broad Jump
protocol: Two-foot take-off from a line, two-foot landing. Best of 3.

label: RSI (Drop Jump 30cm)
protocol: Drop from 30cm, minimal contact time. RSI = jump height ÷ contact time.

label: RSI-Modified (CMJ)
protocol: CMJ jump height ÷ time-to-take-off (force plate).

label: IMTP RFD 0–100ms
protocol: Isometric mid-thigh pull on fixed bar. Force plate, max effort, 5s rep.

label: Back Squat 1RM
protocol: True 1RM or estimated via Epley from a clean rep ≤5 RIR 0. Note depth (parallel/below).

label: Front Squat 1RM
protocol: Full depth, clean grip.

label: Bench Press 1RM
protocol: Pause on chest, no bounce, full lockout. Spotter present.

label: Deadlift 1RM
protocol: Conventional or sumo (note which). Full lockout.

label: Power Clean 1RM
protocol: Floor to front rack. No full squat catch.

label: Snatch 1RM
protocol: Full snatch or power snatch.

label: Hip Thrust 1RM
protocol: Barbell hip thrust, full hip extension at top.

label: IMTP Peak Force
protocol: Isometric mid-thigh pull, knee 125–145°, hip 140–150°, max effort 5s on force plate.

label: IMTP Rel. Peak Force
protocol: IMTP peak vertical force ÷ body mass.

label: Pull-ups (Max Reps)
protocol: Dead-hang, chin over bar, no kip.

label: Weighted Pull-up 1RM
protocol: Added weight for 1 rep. Full dead hang to chin over bar.

label: Sit & Reach
protocol: Standard sit-and-reach box, shoes off, knees flat. Slow reach, hold 2s. Best of 3.

label: Knee-to-Wall (L)
protocol: Distance from longest toe to wall when knee touches wall, heel down. Ankle dorsiflexion.

label: Knee-to-Wall (R)
protocol: Same side.

label: Thomas Test (L)
protocol: Supine on bench, opposite knee to chest. Measure hip extension angle (negative = tight).

label: Thomas Test (R)
protocol: Same side.

label: Active SLR (L)
protocol: Supine, knee straight, raise leg without lumbar flexion. Goniometer at hip.

label: Active SLR (R)
protocol: Same side.

label: Shoulder Flexion ROM
protocol: Supine, arm overhead, lumbar flat. Goniometer at acromion.

label: Overhead Squat (FMS)
protocol: FMS overhead squat. Scored 0–3 by trained tester.

label: FMS Total Score
protocol: Functional Movement Screen, 7 tests. Trained tester only.

label: Adductor Squeeze
protocol: Supine, knees straight, BP cuff between ankles inflated to 10 mmHg, squeeze max 5s.

label: VO₂max
protocol: Lab graded exercise test or validated field estimate (beep test, Cooper).

label: Yo-Yo IR1 Distance
protocol: 20m shuttles with 10s active recovery, increasing speed. Stop at 2nd failure.

label: Yo-Yo IR2 Distance
protocol: Higher-intensity version of IR1.

label: 30-15 IFT Velocity
protocol: 30s shuttle / 15s walk protocol. Final stage velocity = VIFT.

label: Max Aerobic Speed
protocol: From 1.2–2km TT or 5 min running test. MAS = avg velocity.

label: 1.2km Time Trial
protocol: Flat surface, timed from start. Record in seconds.

label: Bronco Test
protocol: 5×(60+40+20m) shuttles continuous, total 1200m. Standard conditioning test.

label: 2km Time Trial
protocol: Flat surface, all-out effort.

label: Resting Heart Rate
protocol: Measured supine, first thing on waking, 1 min average.

label: HRV (RMSSD)
protocol: Morning, supine, 1–5 min recording with chest strap or validated app.

label: HR Recovery (60s)
protocol: 60s post-max effort HR recovery drop.

label: Body Mass
protocol: Morning, post-void, minimal clothing, calibrated scale.

label: Standing Height
protocol: Stadiometer, no shoes, head in Frankfort plane.

label: Sitting Height
protocol: Sitting on flat surface, back straight.

label: Wingspan (Arm Span)
protocol: Arms horizontal, fingertip to fingertip against a wall.

label: Body Fat %
protocol: DEXA preferred. ISAK skinfolds or BIA acceptable if standardised.

label: Sum of 7 Skinfolds
protocol: ISAK level 1 sites: tri, sub, bi, supraspinale, abdominal, thigh, calf.

label: Lean Body Mass
protocol: DEXA total lean (excluding bone mineral content).

label: Fat Mass
protocol: DEXA or derived from body fat % and body mass.
